body:
Hi Nandi,

Thanks for flagging this. We have logged it with our transmission team and they are checking the Soweto repeater. Could you confirm exactly which streets you notice it worst?

Sipho, Rhythm FM

It is worst around Vilakazi Street and towards Orlando. Thanks for looking into it.

Nandi

Hi Lwandile,

I hear you on the ad load. We are bound by some sponsor commitments, but I have passed your note to our programming team to review the morning break structure.

Sipho, Rhythm FM
Internal note: forwarded to Nandi Dlamini in programming for the next break review.

Hi Priya,

Voices of the City is still running, it just moved to a later slot this month while we record the anniversary documentary. It is back at its normal Tuesday time from next week.

Asha

That is great news, thank you Asha. I will be listening on Tuesday.

Priya

Hi Zinhle,

Fair point. I have briefed the desk to give the songs cleaner intros and outros, especially the first track after each break.

Sipho, Rhythm FM

Thank you, it already sounds better this morning.

Zinhle

Hi Themba,

The competition is genuinely open to all callers, drawn at random from those who get through. Lines do get busy. We will publish the rules on the website to make it clearer.

Sipho, Rhythm FM

Hi Lerato,

Sorry about the buffering. Could you tell me which app and phone you use, and your network? We are looking at the stream server load during peak morning hours.

Naledi, Rhythm FM

I use the Rhythm FM app on an iPhone on the office wifi. It buffers most between 07:00 and 08:00.

Lerato

Hi Sibongile,

Thank you, and noted. I am pushing to widen the new music rotation and add more local artists. Any favourites you want to hear? Always taking suggestions.

Asha

Would love more cumbia and some local jazz. Thanks Asha!

Sibongile

Hi Karabo,

Good suggestion. We are moving the main traffic update to just before 07:00 from next week, with a quick top-up at 07:30.

Sipho, Rhythm FM

Hi Ayanda,

Thanks, that is a useful catch. Naledi is re-checking the jingle levels against the music bed so they sit at the same loudness.

Sipho, Rhythm FM
Internal note: re-mastered jingle pack loaded to the playout system, levels normalised to match music.

Hi Tshepo,

Agreed, that one hurt to cut. We had a hard ad commitment at the top of the hour. I will try to schedule longer interviews away from those breaks in future.

Asha

Hi Refilwe,

Apologies for the delay. We had an export issue on the podcast feed. It is fixed now and uploads should be same-day going forward.

Naledi, Rhythm FM

Hi Bongani,

Thanks for letting us know. Coverage that far south is at the edge of our footprint. I have logged it with engineering, but a booster is a bigger project I cannot promise yet.

Sipho, Rhythm FM

Hi Mpho,

This made my morning. The Spanish word of the day is coming back next week, by popular demand. Tell the kids to listen out.

Asha

Hi Anele,

You are right, the bulletin should refresh through the morning. I have raised it with the newsroom so headlines are updated each hour.

Sipho, Rhythm FM

Hi Fatima,

Thanks for the detail. We reproduced the Listen Live issue on mobile Safari and our web team is deploying a fix today. Please try again this afternoon.

Naledi, Rhythm FM

Hi Dumisani,

Thank you for the heads-up. We had a playout handover glitch a couple of mornings. The team has tightened the start sequence so we open on time.

Asha
